A tagging interface for break and empty line elements.

Return true if empty lines are dumped as new lines.

Sets if the sentence ends with a new line.

Sets if the sentence ends with a new line.

Sets if the sentence ends with a new line.

Tags an external link extended image.
ExternalLink - Interface in org.docgene.model
Represent an external link, which can be a bare link or a link to a class in a Java API.

Represent a Menu Item pointing to an external link.
